RemediationStrings.Title: AuditClientDoesNotSupportEncryption (Lanman Server)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanServer\AuditClientDoesNotSupportEncryption must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Server.

RemediationStrings.Title: AuditClientDoesNotSupportSigning (Lanman Server)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanServer\AuditClientDoesNotSupportSigning must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Server.

RemediationStrings.Title: AuditInsecureGuestLogon (Lanman Server)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanServer\AuditInsecureGuestLogon must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Server.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableAuthRateLimiter (Lanman Server)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanServer\EnableAuthRateLimiter must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Server.

RemediationStrings.Title: MaxSmb2Dialect (Lanman Server)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanServer\MaxSmb2Dialect must be 785. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Server.

RemediationStrings.Title: MinSmb2Dialect (Lanman Server)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanServer\MinSmb2Dialect must be 768. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Server.

RemediationStrings.Title: InvalidAuthenticationDelayTimeInMs (Lanman Server)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\LanmanServer\InvalidAuthenticationDelayTimeInMs must be 2000. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Server.

RemediationStrings.Title: RestrictNullSessAccess (Lanman Server)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\LanManServer\Parameters\RestrictNullSessAccess must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Server.

RemediationStrings.Title: requiresecuritysignature (Lanman Server)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Services\LanManServer\Parameters\requiresecuritysignature must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Lanman Server.
